ddls:
CREATE TABLE "trees" (
  "tree_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each tree */,
  "species_name" TEXT /* Name of the species of the tree */,
  "location" TEXT /* Geographical location of the tree */,
  "age" INTEGER /* Age of the tree in years */,
  "height" REAL /* Height of the tree in meters */,
  "trunk_diameter" REAL /* Diameter of the tree trunk in centimeters */,
  "last_measurement_date" TEXT /* Date of the last measurement taken */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the research project the tree measurement is part of */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tree_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "research_projects" (
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each research project */,
  "project_name" TEXT /* Name of the research project */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the research project */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the research project */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the research project */,
  "budget" REAL /* Budget allocated for the project */,
  "principal_investigator" TEXT /* Name of the principal investigator */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the project */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "measurement_types" (
  "measurement_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each measurement type */,
  "measurement_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the measurement type (e.g., EP, CP) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the measurement type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("measurement_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, admin) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for secure authentication */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the last login */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the user account was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "measurement_id" INTEGER /* ID of the measurement being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the measurement */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the measurement data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "device_type" TEXT /* Type of device used (e.g., desktop, mobile) */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_ip_address FOREIGN KEY ("ip_address") REFERENCES users ("ip_address")
)

CREATE TABLE "environmental_conditions" (
  "condition_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each set of environmental conditions */,
  "measurement_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the measurement taken */,
  "temperature" REAL /* Temperature in degrees Celsius */,
  "humidity" REAL /* Humidity percentage */,
  "light_intensity" REAL /* Light intensity in lux */,
  "wind_speed" REAL /* Wind speed in meters per second */,
  "atmospheric_pressure" REAL /* Atmospheric pressure in hPa */,
  "soil_moisture" REAL /* Soil moisture percentage */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("condition_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_quality_checks" (
  "quality_check_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each quality check */,
  "measurement_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the measurement checked */,
  "check_date" TEXT /* Date when the quality check was performed */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the measurement after the check (e.g., valid, invalid) */,
  "comments" TEXT /* Any comments or notes regarding the quality check */,
  "checker_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who performed the quality check */,
  "retest_required" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if a retest is required */,
  "retest_date" TEXT /* Date when the retest is scheduled */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("quality_check_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_quality_checks_checker_id FOREIGN KEY ("checker_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "locations" (
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each location */,
  "tree_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the tree measured */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the measurement location */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the measurement location */,
  "altitude" REAL /* Altitude of the measurement location */,
  "time_zone" TEXT /* Time zone of the location */,
  "local_time" TEXT /* Local time when the measurement was taken */,
  "nearest_city" TEXT /* Name of the nearest city for reference */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("location_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_locations_tree_id FOREIGN KEY ("tree_id") REFERENCES trees ("tree_id")
)
